Mo Compelling Deft Donny Randell Wells Attendance And Testimony At Deposition, Production Of Documents At Deposition, And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff LEGALMATCH.COM, INC's Motion To Compel Defendant Donny Randall Wells' Attendance and Testimony At Deposition, Production of Documents At Deposition is denied. The court finds that the deposition was not noticed for a location within 150 miles of Defendant's residence. While the motion does not address the objections to the document requests, the parties are advised that they suffer from many of the inadequacies noted in the previous ruling by this court. The parties are ordered to meet and confer regarding the scheduling of the deposition within a reasonable time, and the breadth of the document requests. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

NOTE: No notification was received regarding oral argument.
(If oral argument is requested, appear at 10:30 a.m. on May 9, 2006.)

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Text Ruling

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Ken LaMance, Esq., for Plaintiff/Moving party
Barry Sabahat, Esq., specially appeared for Behrad Amirmoki, Atty for Defendant/Opposing party
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted with modifications: Plaintiff LEGALMATCH.COM INC's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents and Further Responses To Special Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part.
As to the Special Interrogatories, the motion is denied as to No. 4 as there is no definition or identification of Legalmatch.com member attorneys.
As to No. 5, the motion is denied as overly broad as to time and subject matter of representations.
As to No. 6, the motion is granted.
As to the Requests for Production, the motion is granted as to No. 1, limited to any employment contract, redacting any additional information contained in the documents.
As to No. 2, the motion is denied as overly broad as to time and subject matter and as there is no definition or identification of Legalmatch.com member attorneys.
As to No. 3, the motion is denied as overly broad as to subject matter and as there is no definition or identification of Legalmatch.com member attorneys.
As to No. 4, the motion is denied as overly broad.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
All requests for sanctions are denied.
MODIFICATIONS:
As to No. 3, the motion is denied as overly broad as to subject matter and as there is no definition or identification of Legalmatch.com CURRENT & FORMER EMPLOYEES. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint By Pltf Legalmatch.Com; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Apr-20-2006 Text Ruling
